overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a cinematic video game showing a character with a large backpack walking through a desolate, misty mountain valley at dusk. The character traverses rocky terrain toward an illuminated dome structure that becomes visible in the distance, creating a mysterious and atmospheric sci-fi environment.

scene_state.functional_zone: open mountain valley with jagged peaks ahead

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the valley toward the prominent mountain peak visible ahead

entered.detail: tall jagged mountain peak dominating the horizon ahead
dark rocky mountain slopes forming the left valley wall
steep rocky cliffs forming the right valley wall
uneven dirt and gravel ground with scattered rocks

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a wide, desolate mountain valley at dusk. A prominent jagged peak dominates the center horizon, framed by mountain ranges on both sides. The terrain is rocky and barren with sparse vegetation, creating an isolated and atmospheric environment.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky mountain pass with steep cliff walls

events.description: illuminated dome structure becomes visible on the left horizon

agents.ego_description: navigating through rockier terrain as the path curves slightly leftward

entered.detail: large geodesic dome emitting bright white light on the hillside
large boulders and rock formations along the right path

segments.scene_description: The character continues through a narrower rocky passage where the terrain becomes more enclosed by cliffs. The central peak shifts to the left as the path curves. Near the end of the segment, an illuminated dome structure becomes visible in the distance on the left, introducing an artificial element to the natural landscape.

scene_state.functional_zone: approaching illuminated dome structure in rocky wasteland

events.description: approaching the brightly lit dome, ambient illumination increases on the left side

agents.ego_description: walking toward the illuminated dome structure that dominates the left side of the frame

entered.detail: concrete or metallic structure supporting the illuminated dome

segments.scene_description: The character approaches the illuminated dome structure, which grows from a distant light to a dominant feature on the left. The building's base becomes visible as a concrete structure with vertical light panels. The ambient lighting shifts to mixed as the dome's bright illumination contrasts with the darkening valley, while the surrounding rocky terrain passes by on the right.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a desolate mountain valley at dusk that gradually transitions from a vast natural wilderness to the vicinity of a mysterious artificial structure. It begins in a wide, barren expanse dominated by a jagged central peak and framed by distant mountain ranges. As the character advances, the terrain narrows into a rocky passage enclosed by cliffs, causing the central peak to shift leftward as the path curves. The scene then opens up to reveal an illuminated dome structure in the distance, which grows from a faint light into a dominant feature on the left. Finally, the camera approaches the concrete base of the dome and its vertical light panels, while the ambient lighting shifts to a sharp contrast between the bright artificial glow and the darkening valley.
